name: Chocolate Sponge Slices
recipeIngredient: 11 ounces Chocolate (your preference - I like semi-sweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the mascarpone, sugar, and brandy together with a wooden spoon.
2. Cut a sponge cake into small rectangles.
3. Spread each rectangle with the mascarpone mixture.
4. Place another slice of cake on top to make a sandwich.
5. Lightly press the sandwiches together.
6. Melt chocolate and water in a double boiler. Remove from heat.
7. Dip each sandwich into the melted chocolate, coating all sides.
8. Use a fork to hold the sandwiches while dipping them in the chocolate.
9. Place the coated sandwiches on a serving dish.
10. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
11. Refrigerate until hardened. Serve at nearly room temperature.
